name: Mom's Gwumkies (Stuffed Cabbage)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the outside leaves from the cabbage and cut out the core.
2. Place the cabbages in a large pot of water and boil for about 20 minutes. Drain and separate the leaves.
3. Mix together all remaining ingredients (excluding the cabbages).
4. Spoon about ¼ cup of the mixture into each cabbage leaf.
5. Fold the edges of the leaf over the filling and roll up tightly.
6. Place the rolls in a large roasting pan, covered completely with small leaves.
7. Add several strips of bacon on top.
8. Pour 2 small cans or 1 large can of tomato sauce over the rolls.
9. Add 1½ to 2 cups of water to prevent sticking.
10. Bake at 350°F for 1 to 1½ hours.
Good served with baked potatoes, potato salad, or squash.
